# SpartanH2

> Motorcycle content creator. Personal landing page linking to social channels, merch, Patreon, and direct crypto support.

## About
SpartanH2 makes motorcycle content — riding, gear, and community. This site is the central hub connecting fans to all channels and support options.

## Pages
- [Home](https://spartanh2.com/): main landing page with all social and support links
- [Direct Support](https://spartanh2.com/direct): send crypto (BTC, XMR, DOGE) directly to the creator
- [Merch (Coming Soon)](https://spartanh2.com/coming-soon): merch store placeholder while sh2.store is in build

## Social channels
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@SpartanH2
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/SpartanH2/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@spartan.h2
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/Spartan_H2
- Discord server: https://discord.gg/fz67hjDnPW
- Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/Spartan_H2
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61591693924495
- Rumble: https://rumble.com/user/SpartanH2

## Support
- Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/SpartanH2
- Merch store (in build): https://sh2.store
- Direct crypto (BTC / XMR / DOGE): https://spartanh2.com/direct

## Contact
- Website: https://spartanh2.com
